title: Inclusion of certain provisions in contracts of employment
content:
Last updated date
17.6.2022
Employment Ordinance
Part VIIIA	
8A-24
Section 41E	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
prohibited
The inclusion by any person in a contract of employment of 
any term or condition which purports to affect in any way the 
provisions of section 41E(2) in their application to such employee, 
is prohibited and any such term or condition, if so included, shall 
be void.
(Added 53 of 1990 s. 3)

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
